title: PipelineInput
description: Canonical mission input for the RPO planner. Used by both the CLI (as JSON file input) and the WebSocket API (as the `mission` field in every request). The server is stateless: send the full definition with every message.

chief.description: Chief spacecraft ECI state at the mission epoch.

deputy.description: Deputy spacecraft ECI state at the mission epoch.

perch.description: Perch orbit geometry for Lambert-to-proximity handoff. Default: V-bar hold at 5 km.

lambert_config.description: Lambert solver configuration (direction and revolution count).

waypoints.description: Waypoint targets in the RIC frame. At least one waypoint is required for mission planning.

proximity.description: Classification threshold for proximity vs. far-field.

config.description: Solver configuration: targeting, TOF optimization, and safety.

propagator.description: Propagator selection: J2 analytical or J2+drag analytical.

chief_config.description: Chief spacecraft physical properties. Required for validate, mc, and drag extraction.

deputy_config.description: Deputy spacecraft physical properties. Required for validate, mc, and drag extraction.

navigation_accuracy.description: Navigation accuracy for covariance propagation. If omitted, covariance is not computed.

maneuver_uncertainty.description: Maneuver execution uncertainty for covariance propagation.

monte_carlo.description: Monte Carlo configuration. Required for the RunMC command.

StateVector.description: Spacecraft state in Earth-Centered Inertial (ECI) frame.

epoch.description: Epoch in ISO 8601 format (e.g., "2024-01-01T00:00:00 UTC"). Parsed by hifitime.

position_eci_km.description: ECI position vector [x, y, z] in kilometers.

velocity_eci_km_s.description: ECI velocity vector [vx, vy, vz] in km/s.

WaypointInput.description: A waypoint target in the RIC (Radial, In-track, Cross-track) frame relative to the chief.

position_ric_km.description: RIC position target [R, I, C] in kilometers.

velocity_ric_km_s.description: RIC velocity target [R, I, C] in km/s. Defaults to [0, 0, 0] if omitted.

tof_s.description: Time-of-flight hint in seconds. If omitted, the solver optimizes TOF via golden-section search.

label.description: Human-readable label for display (e.g., "Approach to 2 km").

PerchGeometry.description: Predefined perch orbit geometry relative to the chief. Exactly one variant must be specified.

oneOf.description: V-bar hold: deputy ahead/behind chief along the velocity vector.

along_track_km.description: Along-track offset in km. Positive = ahead of chief.

oneOf.description: R-bar hold: deputy above/below chief along the radial vector.

radial_km.description: Radial offset in km. Positive = above chief.

LambertConfig.description: Configuration for the Lambert transfer solver.

revolutions.description: Number of complete revolutions (0 = direct transfer).

roe_threshold.description: Max dimensionless relative separation (delta-r/r) for ROE linearization validity. Below this threshold, the pair is classified as Proximity; above, as FarField.

MissionConfig.description: Bundled mission configuration: targeting, TOF optimization, and safety.

safety.description: Passive safety analysis settings. If omitted, safety analysis is skipped.

initial_damping.description: Initial damping factor for Newton steps.

dv_cap_km_s.description: Cap on any single delta-v component in km/s.

trajectory_steps.description: Number of trajectory sample points per leg for output.

min_periods.description: Minimum TOF as fraction of the chief orbital period.

max_periods.description: Maximum TOF as fraction of the chief orbital period.

num_starts.description: Number of initial TOF samples for multi-start optimization.

SafetyConfig.description: Safety analysis thresholds for operational and passive safety checks.

min_ei_separation_km.description: Eccentricity/inclination vector separation threshold in km (passive/abort safety, D'Amico Eq. 2.22).

min_distance_3d_km.description: 3D keep-out sphere threshold in km (operational safety).

PropagatorChoice.description: Propagator selection. Either the string "j2" or an object with a "j2_drag" key containing a DragConfig.

DragConfig.description: Density-model-free (DMF) differential drag configuration (Koenig Sec. VIII). Time derivatives of relative orbital elements due to differential drag.

da_dot.description: Time derivative of relative SMA due to drag (1/s, normalized by chief SMA).

dex_dot.description: Time derivative of relative eccentricity x-component due to drag (1/s).

dey_dot.description: Time derivative of relative eccentricity y-component due to drag (1/s).

SpacecraftConfig.description: Physical properties of a spacecraft for force modeling (nyx propagation, drag extraction).

drag_area_m2.description: Drag reference area in square meters.

srp_area_m2.description: Solar radiation pressure reference area in square meters.

NavigationAccuracy.description: Navigation accuracy specification in the RIC frame for covariance propagation.

position_sigma_ric_km.description: 1-sigma position accuracy per RIC axis [radial, in-track, cross-track] in km.

velocity_sigma_ric_km_s.description: 1-sigma velocity accuracy per RIC axis [radial, in-track, cross-track] in km/s.

ManeuverUncertainty.description: Maneuver execution uncertainty model for covariance propagation.

pointing_sigma_rad.description: 1-sigma pointing error in radians, applied as isotropic rotation about the delta-v axis.

MonteCarloConfig.description: Monte Carlo ensemble analysis configuration. All MC runs use nyx full-physics propagation.

num_samples.description: Number of Monte Carlo samples to run.

dispersions.description: Dispersion models for state, maneuver, and spacecraft properties.

mode.description: Execution mode: "OpenLoop" applies nominal delta-v plan with execution errors; "ClosedLoop" re-targets from each dispersed initial state.

seed.description: Master RNG seed for deterministic reproducibility. Defaults to 42 if omitted.

trajectory_steps.description: Number of trajectory sample points per leg for dispersion envelope.

DispersionConfig.description: Composite dispersion configuration for Monte Carlo analysis.

state.description: Initial state uncertainty in the RIC frame (applied to deputy).

StateDispersion.description: Initial state uncertainty model in the RIC frame, applied to the deputy.

ManeuverDispersion.description: Maneuver execution error model for Monte Carlo sampling.

SpacecraftDispersion.description: Spacecraft property uncertainty for Monte Carlo (deputy only).

drag_area_m2.description: Drag cross-sectional area dispersion in square meters.

Distribution.description: Distribution model for scalar uncertainty parameters. Exactly one variant.

half_width.description: Half-width of the uniform range (must be non-negative).
